name: Almond Nougat Crispies
recipeIngredient: Candy bars - 3 oz each (such as Toblerone)
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter an 8-inch square baking pan and set aside.
2. Chop the nougat bars finely.
3. Toss cereal and nuts in a bowl to mix.
4. Melt butter in a large saucepan. Add marshmallows; cook, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon, until melted.
5. Add chopped nougat, stirring until melted. Remove from heat.
6. Add the cereal mixture; toss until well coated.
7. Using a buttered spatula, press the mixture evenly into the prepared pan.
8. Cut into squares when cool.
